description: The message transmitted with the event and relevant attributes for signing and encryption.

message.description: The message needs to be first gzipped and afterwards encrypted. The base64 representation of encrypted bytes will be added as payload

messageSignature.description: Signature of the message, to verify by whom the encrypted message has been created

encryptionKey.description: The symmetric key to decrypt the data (DEK), encrypted with the public key of the receiver. (KEK)

publicKeyVersion.description: The version of the public key (KEK) used to encrypt the encryptionKey (DEK)

signatureKeyVersion.description: The version of the signature key, that was used to sign the message.
